targets.expr: count(((resource_group_node_used_cards{groupId=~"$groupId",groupId!=""} > 0) and on(node, groupId) (resource_group_node_used_cards{groupId=~"$groupId",groupId!=""} < resource_group_node_capacity_cards{groupId=~"$groupId",groupId!=""})) and on(node) max by(node) (kube_node_info)) by (groupId)

count((resource_group_node_used_cards{groupId=~"$groupId",groupId!=""} == on(node, groupId) resource_group_node_capacity_cards{groupId=~"$groupId",groupId!=""}) and on(node) max by(node) (kube_node_info)) by (groupId)
count((max by(node, groupId) (resource_group_node_capacity_cards{groupId=~"$groupId",groupId!=""} >= bool 0) and on(node) max by(node) (kube_node_info))) by (groupId)

sum by(groupId) (
  (
    (max by(node) (kube_node_spec_unschedulable) == 1)
    or
    (max by(node) (kube_node_status_condition{condition="Ready",status="true"} == bool 0))
  )
  * on(node) group_left(groupId) max by(node, groupId) (resource_group_node_capacity_cards{groupId=~"$groupId",groupId!=""} >= bool 0)
)

sum(
  kube_pod_container_resource_limits{resource=~"hygon_com_dcu|nvidia_com_gpu"}
  * on(node) group_left(groupId)
    max by(node, groupId) (resource_group_node_capacity_cards{groupId=~"$groupId",groupId!=""} >= bool 0)
) by (pod, resource, namespace, node)
* on(namespace, pod) group_left(phase)
  (max(kube_pod_status_phase) by (namespace, pod, phase) == 1)

group by(node, groupId) (
  (resource_group_node_used_cards{groupId=~"$groupId",groupId!=""} == 0)
  and on(node) max by(node) (kube_node_info)
)
